/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/traffic_model.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/traffic_model.dir/Sources/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_model.dir/Sources/Traffic_Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_model.dir/Sources/Uniform_Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_model.dir/Sources/Poisson_Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_model.dir/Sources/File_Manager.cpp.o -o traffic_model
